leadText: Mind's Eye (Japanese: 命中率ダウン耐性 Accuracy Reduction Resistance) is a skill in Pokémon Masters EX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When the user's accuracy is lowered to a negative stat value, the effects of the negative stat value on accuracy are reduced. The skill can range from Mind's Eye 1 to Mind's Eye 9, with higher numbered skills resulting in a greater mitigation in the effects of a stat reduction in accuracy. Skill rank Reduction in the effect of negative accuracy stat values Mind's Eye 1 10% Mind's Eye 2 20% Mind's Eye 3 30% Mind's Eye 4 40% Mind's Eye 5 50% Mind's Eye 6 60% Mind's Eye 7 70% Mind's Eye 8 80% Mind's Eye 9 90%
